prompt: A gritty cinematic World War II movie poster in a vertical one-sheet layout, designed like a modern prestige war film advertisement. At the top, two centered tagline lines in condensed uppercase text read {argument name="top tagline" default="COURAGE. BROTHERHOOD. SACRIFICE."} and {argument name="second tagline" default="VICTORY COMES AT A PRICE."}. The main composition features 4 American WWII soldiers in the foreground wearing dark olive uniforms and large netted M1 helmets: 1 dominant central soldier shown from the chest up, facing forward, flanked by 3 slightly smaller soldiers receding behind him, one on the left and 2 on the right. Their faces are shadowed, dirty, battle-worn, and dramatic, with intense low-key lighting and smoky backlight. Behind them, a stormy war-torn sky filled with heavy smoke columns, sparks, embers, and 2 aircraft groups: 1 group of 3 planes on the upper left and 1 group of 5 planes on the upper right. In the middle, a small centered line of text says {argument name="based on text" default="INSPIRED BY TRUE EVENTS"}. Below it, an enormous distressed title in bold block letters reads {argument name="movie title" default="D-DAY"}, with a star used as the separator between the two D letters. Under the title, a red condensed date line reads {argument name="date text" default="JUNE 6, 1944"}. The lower half shows the D-Day beach landing from the viewpoint inside an open landing craft, with 2 dark metal ramp walls framing the left and right edges. In the surf, exactly 8 soldiers are wading toward shore with rifles and packs, surrounded by Czech hedgehog beach obstacles, rough water, smoke, distant fires, and an embattled coastline under bombardment. At the very bottom is a dense strip of tiny production credits, and beneath that a bold red release line reading {argument name="release text" default="COMING SOON"}, followed by a smaller white line, "HONOR THEIR SACRIFICE.". Color palette is charcoal gray, steel blue, muddy brown, and fire orange with red accent typography. Ultra-detailed, photoreal, high contrast, moody, epic, historical, dramatic theatrical poster design, realistic film grain, volumetric smoke, distressed textures, symmetrical composition, premium blockbuster key art.
translatedPrompt: 一张充满质感的二战电影海报，采用垂直单页布局，设计风格如同现代高规格战争片广告。海报顶部居中显示两行压缩大写标语：{argument name="top tagline" default="勇气。兄弟情。牺牲。"} 和 {argument name="second tagline" default="胜利的代价。"}。主体构图为 4 名身着深橄榄色制服、佩戴大网眼 M1 头盔的美国二战士兵：1 名占据主导地位的中央士兵半身像面向前方，两侧各有 3 名略小的士兵，左侧 1 名，右侧 2 名。他们的面部笼罩在阴影中，布满污垢，饱经战火，光影效果强烈，伴有烟雾缭绕的背光。背景是战火纷飞的阴沉天空，充斥着浓烟、火花、余烬以及 2 组飞机：左上方 3 架，右上方 5 架。画面中部有一行居中的小字：{argument name="based on text" default="根据真实事件改编"}。下方是巨大的粗体块状做旧标题：{argument name="movie title" default="D-DAY"}，两个 D 字母之间用星号分隔。标题下方是一行红色的压缩日期：{argument name="date text" default="1944 年 6 月 6 日"}。下半部分展示了从敞开的登陆艇内部视角看到的诺曼底登陆场景，两侧由两扇深色金属斜坡墙框住。在浪花中，共有 8 名士兵背着步枪和背包向岸边涉水前进，周围布满了捷克刺猬型路障、汹涌的海水、烟雾、远处的火光以及遭受轰炸的海岸线。最底部是一条密集的微小制作人员名单，下方是醒目的红色上映日期行：{argument name="release text" default="即将上映"}，紧随其后是一行较小的白色文字：“致敬他们的牺牲。”。色调为炭灰色、钢蓝色、泥棕色，并配以红色强调字体。超精细、写实、高对比度、情绪化、史诗感、历史感、戏剧性的影院海报设计，具有真实的胶片颗粒感、体积烟雾、做旧纹理、对称构图，是顶级大片的主视觉艺术。

breakdown.creativeCore: 二战诺曼底登陆电影海报：一张黑暗、写实的战争电影海报，展示了四名二战士兵在海滩登陆场景上方的画面，非常适合生成具有戏剧性的历史电影主视觉图。
breakdown.subject: 产品
breakdown.text: 要求精确文字；文字是主视觉
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 电影海报、音乐封面、书籍封面、播客封面

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 海报/封面 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: centered, symmetrical, vertical]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic, cinematic, premium]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: backlight, volumetric, high contrast, film grain]。

Text requirements:
要求精确文字；文字是主视觉。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
